content: Task task-010 is ready to land. Added docs/SUPABASE_SETUP.md, supabase/config.toml, and .env.example guidance. Important auth decision recorded: Google redirect URIs should point only to Supabase `/auth/v1/callback`; app web/native callbacks belong in Supabase URL configuration (`/auth/callback`, `worktracker://auth/callback`).

Task task-010 completed: Added Supabase/Google OAuth setup documentation and local auth configuration. Updated worktracker/.env.example with GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID and GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET placeholders plus deep-link guidance, added worktracker/supabase/config.toml with local Supabase Auth settings for Google (`client_id`/`secret` from env, local site URL, and redirect allow-list including `worktracker://auth/callback`), and created worktracker/docs/SUPABASE_SETUP.md explaining the full setup flow across Google Cloud Console, Supabase Dashboard, and local Supabase CLI. Recorded an auth decision clarifying that Google redirects only to Supabase `/auth/v1/callback`, while app web/native callbacks belong in Supabase URL configuration. Validation: `npm run typecheck` passed, `npx prettier --check docs/SUPABASE_SETUP.md` passed, and `git diff --check` passed for the touched files. `git pull --rebase` could not be completed because the shared worktree already had unrelated unstaged changes and no configured remote. Committed as `4f84345` with message `[task-010] Document Supabase Google OAuth setup`. Tests beyond typecheck were not applicable because this task only added configuration/docs and the repo does not yet expose a dedicated automated auth test suite.
Received wind_down. Current task is complete, committed, and marked complete. Pausing now and exiting without claiming additional tasks.
